title: 日本ダービーの後に・星あげます！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto wins the Japanese Derby, surpassing
Admire Vega. But unlike her competitor, there is
no one to whom she can dedicate this star of
victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Admire Vega respectfully takes her leave. As
Meisho Doto watches, she dreams of one day
finding someone to run for.
